name: Phoenix Marketing Agency
description: Web3/web2 marketing agency — $80K/mo, 5 clients (Benqi, Pharaoh, Magic Eden, Bullet, Pro Rata). Scaling services.
priority_why: Primary business — all revenue flows here

name: JonathanOS Dashboard (jOS)
description: JonathanOS v2 dashboard — live at localhost:8888. Projects, tasks, agents, ideas, heartbeat, and system health.
priority_why: Jonathan's primary interface to the entire system

name: SharkTime Trading System
description: Institutional-grade trading signals, scanner bots, market data API on pai. ICT + Shark signals.
priority_why: Jonathan's trading income — signals must be accurate

name: Fern (Fitness App)
description: Unified fitness app. FastAPI backend on pai:8000, SQLite storage. Android Expo app in progress.
priority_why: Revenue opportunity — MVP needed before Jonathan can test

name: Fern BLE Protocol Fix
description: Verify Vitruvian BLE weight commands (0x04 program frame). Needs APK build + physical test. Superset flow + group-start UX queued.

name: Atlas Social Analytics
description: Twitter analytics for Phoenix clients: engagement per tweet, follower growth, sentiment, optimal posting times, competitor tracking. Outputs to Notion.

name: Telegram Reader
description: Telethon reader → Discord #notifications. Keyword filter, SQLite dedupe, rate limiting, auto-reconnect.

name: jOS Self-Improving Flow
description: Weekly analyzer + improver + deployer loop for JonathanOS. Spawns sub-agents, Forge reviews, deploys with health checks.
priority_why: Keeps jOS improving without manual oversight

name: Trading Bot Transparency Dashboard
description: P&L dashboard + position tracker for trading bots. Phase 1 live metrics, then backtests + alerts.

name: Inbox Duplicate Reduction
description: Reduce #inbox overload. Move midday + closing trading reads to #notifications, keep morning read in inbox.

name: Truth Accountability Verification
description: Verify Truth is delivering accountability reports. Last logged report March 3 despite cron OK.

name: MiniMax PAYG Monitoring
description: Add PAYG spend tracking to JonathanOS. Daily/weekly spend, alerts at 80% threshold.

name: Voice Feedback Bot Pipeline
description: Discord voice → Whisper transcription → sentiment → routing. Consolidates T-116 through T-120.

name: HL Funding Harvester Pro
description: Dynamic funding rate delta capture bot. Monitors HL perpetuals, pairs long/short with spread ≥0.10%/8h.

name: Volatility Breakout Scanner
description: AlphaVantage scanner for 20-day range breakouts with volume confirmation. NVDA, META, MSFT, AMZN, BTC, ETH, SOL.

name: Content Pipeline
description: Daily content ideas via Scout/Quill agents, trending topic scanner, weekly reviews. Automated.
priority_why: Scales Jonathan's content output without his time

name: Music Curation Business
description: Premium playlist curation — Redstone American Grill (10 MN locations, ~$15K/yr). Targeting regional upscale chains.
priority_why: Recurring revenue, low maintenance, expansion potential

name: Agent Council System
description: Agent Council governance system — approval workflows and feedback loop.

name: pai Compute Infrastructure
description: Ubuntu box — RTX 3060+3070 Ti (20GB VRAM), 64GB RAM, Ollama, market API, trading bots. IP: 192.168.1.189.
priority_why: Runs all local AI models and trading infrastructure
